mapper.select:
SELECT IVHD.BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , IVHD.DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD , CASE WHEN IVHD.GUAR_TYPE2 = '20' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS GUAR_YN , IVGH.INV_NUM , IVGH.SEND_DATE , POHD.SUBJECT , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , IVGH.PO_NUM , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , IVHD.INV_DATE , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , IVGH.PAY_CNT , POHD.CUR , IVHD.INV_AMT , IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT AS PAY_AMT , IVHD.PIC_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS PIC_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS PIC_USER_TYPE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE , IVPC.PAY_TERMS , IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_NM , IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM , POHD.PO_AMT , IVPC.PAY_TERMS AS PAY_METHOD_TYPE , POHD.PAY_TYPE , IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT AS PY_AMT , SUM_PAY.AP_AMT AS SUM_PAY_AMT FROM STOCIVGH IVGH LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEPT_CD = POHD.DEPT_CD AND POPY.VENDOR_CD = POHD.VENDOR_CD AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVAP IVAP ON (IVAP.GATE_CD = IVPC.GATE_CD AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = IVPC.BUYER_CD AND IVAP.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVAP.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND IVAP.DEPT_CD = IVHD.DEPT_CD AND IVAP.PAY_CNT = IVPC.PAY_CNT AND IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD = IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVAP.PY_DEPT_CD = IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN (SELECT AP.GATE_CD , AP.PO_NUM , AP.BUYER_CD , SUM(AP.AP_AMT) AS AP_AMT FROM STOCIVAP AP WHERE AP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND AP.SIGN_STATUS = '70' AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY AP.GATE_CD, AP.BUYER_CD, AP.PO_NUM) SUM_PAY ON (SUM_PAY.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND SUM_PAY.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND SUM_PAY.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM) WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND IVAP.SIGN_STATUS IS NULL AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = (CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN '300' WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI' THEN '700' ELSE IVHD.PROGRESS_CD END)
AND IVHD.INV_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVHD.INV_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = #{DELIVERY_TYPE}
AND UPPER(IVHD.INV_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INV_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND IVPC.PAY_TERMS = #{PAY_TERMS}
ORDER BY IVHD.INV_NUM DESC

SELECT IVGH.INV_NUM AS INV_NUM , IVHD.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , #{ses.userNm} AS VENDOR_USER_NM , #{ses.telNum} AS VENDOR_TEL_NUM , #{ses.cellNum} AS VENDOR_CELL_NUM , IVHD.CUR AS CUR , IVHD.VAT_TYPE AS VAT_TYPE , (POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PO_CREATE_DATE , POHD.PO_NUM AS PO_NUM , POHD.SUBJECT AS SUBJECT , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID AS CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID AS INSPECT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM , IVPC.PAY_TERMS AS PAY_TERMS , POHD.PO_AMT AS PO_AMT , IVHD.BUYER_CD AS BUYER_CD , IVHD.DEPT_CD , POPY.PAY_CNT AS PAY_CNT , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM AS PAY_CNT_NM , POPY.PAY_PERCENT AS PAY_PERCENT , IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT AS PAY_AMT , IVHD.INV_AMT , CASE WHEN POHD.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN TRUNC(IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT / 11) WHEN POHD.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT * 0.1) ELSE 0 END AS VAT_AMT , '' AS RMK_TEXT_NUM , '' AS ATT_FILE_NUM , IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE , IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_NM , IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM , (IVHD.INV_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS INV_DATE , VNGL.IRS_NO FROM STOCIVGH IVGH LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD = #{PY_BUYER_CD} AND IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD = #{PY_DEPT_CD} AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (VNGL.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = POHD.VENDOR_CD AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVGH.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM}

SELECT IVAP.AP_NUM , IVAP.INV_NUM , IVHD.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , IVAP.VENDOR_USER_NM AS VENDOR_USER_NM , IVAP.VENDOR_TEL_NUM AS VENDOR_TEL_NUM , IVAP.VENDOR_CELL_NUM AS VENDOR_CELL_NUM , IVHD.CUR AS CUR , IVHD.VAT_TYPE AS VAT_TYPE , (POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PO_CREATE_DATE , POHD.PO_NUM AS PO_NUM , POHD.SUBJECT AS SUBJECT , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID AS CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID AS INSPECT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM , IVAP.PAY_TERMS AS PAY_TERMS , POHD.PO_AMT AS PO_AMT , IVHD.BUYER_CD AS BUYER_CD , IVHD.DEPT_CD , POPY.PAY_CNT AS PAY_CNT , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM AS PAY_CNT_NM , POPY.PAY_PERCENT AS PAY_PERCENT , IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT AS PAY_AMT , IVHD.INV_AMT , CASE WHEN POHD.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN TRUNC(IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT / 11) WHEN POHD.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT * 0.1) ELSE 0 END AS VAT_AMT , IVAP.VENDOR_RMK AS RMK_TEXT_NUM , IVAP.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM AS ATT_FILE_NUM , IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE , IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_NM , IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM , (IVHD.INV_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS INV_DATE , IVAP.AP_REQ_SUBJECT , IVAP.AP_REQ_DATE , (IVAP.BILL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS BILL_DATE , IVAP.GUAR_TYPE , IVAP.GUAR_PERCENT , IVAP.GUAR_TYPE2 , IVAP.GUARANTEER , IVAP.GUAR_QT , IVAP.GUAR_AMT , IVAP.BOND_BEGN_DATE , IVAP.BOND_FNSH_DATE , IVAP.GUAR_NUM , IVAP.GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM , IVAP.GUAR_RMK , IVAP.PAY_BANK , GETCODENAME(IVAP.GATE_CD, 'M017', IVAP.PAY_BANK, #{ses.langCd}) AS PAY_BANK_NM , IVAP.PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM AS PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM , IVAP.PAY_ACC_NM , IVAP.PAY_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(IVAP.GATE_CD, IVAP.PAY_ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(IVAP.GATE_CD, IVAP.PAY_ATT_FILE_NUM) END) AS PAY_ATT_FILE_CNT , IVAP.INSU_STATUS , IVAP.BILL_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(IVAP.GATE_CD, IVAP.BILL_ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(IVAP.GATE_CD, IVAP.BILL_ATT_FILE_NUM) END) AS BILL_ATT_FILE_CNT , VNGL.IRS_NO FROM STOCIVAP IVAP LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVAP.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVAP.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = IVAP.PO_NUM AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVAP.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD = #{PY_BUYER_CD} AND IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD = #{PY_DEPT_CD} AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (VNGL.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = IVHD.VENDOR_CD AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVAP.AP_NUM = #{AP_NUM}

SELECT IVDT.INV_SQ , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , IVDT.ITEM_CD , IVDT.ITEM_DESC , IVDT.ITEM_SPEC , IVDT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(IVDT.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, 'MK', IVDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , IVDT.MAKER_PART_NO , PODT.PO_QT , IVDT.UNIT_CD , IVDT.UNIT_PRC , PODT.ITEM_AMT , (PODT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUE_DATE , IVDT.INV_QT AS INV_QT , IVDT.INV_QT AS OLD_INV_QT , IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS INV_AMT , IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS OLD_INV_AMT , IVDT.VAT_AMT AS VAT_AMT , SUM_IVDT.INV_QT AS SUM_INV_QT , SUM_IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS SUM_INV_AMT , SUM2_IVDT.INV_QT AS SUM2_INV_QT , SUM2_IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS SUM2_INV_AMT , PODT.PO_QT + (CASE WHEN TO_NUMBER(IVHD.PROGRESS_CD) >= '100' THEN 0 ELSE IVDT.INV_QT END) - (SUM2_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) - (SUM_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) AS PO_RE_QT , PODT.ITEM_AMT + (CASE WHEN TO_NUMBER(IVHD.PROGRESS_CD) >= '100' THEN 0 ELSE IVDT.ITEM_AMT END) - (SUM2_IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) - (SUM_IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) AS PO_RE_AMT , CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN PODT.GR_QT ELSE IVDT.INV_QT END AS PY_ITEM_QT , CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN PODT.GR_QT * PODT.UNIT_PRC ELSE IVDT.ITEM_AMT END AS PY_ITEM_AMT , CASE WHEN IVHD.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN TRUNC(CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN PODT.GR_QT * PODT.UNIT_PRC ELSE IVDT.ITEM_AMT END / 11) WHEN IVHD.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN PODT.GR_QT * PODT.UNIT_PRC ELSE IVDT.ITEM_AMT END * 0.1) ELSE 0 END AS PY_ITEM_VAT_AMT FROM STOCIVHD IVHD LEFT JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM AND PODT.PO_SQ = IVDT.PO_SQ AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEPT_CD = IVHD.DEPT_CD AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOPC POPC ON (POPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND POPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND POPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND POPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND POPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND POPC.PY_BUYER_CD = #{PY_BUYER_CD} AND POPC.PY_DEPT_CD = #{PY_DEPT_CD} AND POPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , SUM(IVDT.INV_QT) AS INV_QT , SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT) AS ITEM_AMT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND TO_NUMBER(IVHD.PROGRESS_CD) >= '100' AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD, IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PO_SQ) SUM_IVDT ON (SUM_IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND SUM_IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND SUM_IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND SUM_IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) LEFT JOIN (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , SUM(IVDT.INV_QT) AS INV_QT , SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT) AS ITEM_AMT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND TO_NUMBER(IVHD.PROGRESS_CD) = '50' AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD, IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PO_SQ) SUM2_IVDT ON (SUM2_IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND SUM2_IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND SUM2_IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND SUM2_IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) WHERE IVHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVHD.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM} AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY PODT.PO_SQ

SELECT IVAP.BUYER_CD , IVAP.AP_NUM , IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD , IVAP.PY_DEPT_CD , IVAP.SIGN_STATUS , IVAP.AP_REQ_DATE , IVAP.AP_REQ_SUBJECT , IVAP.AP_DATE , IVAP.CUR , IVAP.AP_REQ_AMT FROM STOCIVAP IVAP WHERE IVAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVAP.AP_NUM = #{AP_NUM} AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY IVAP.AP_NUM DESC

SELECT A.* , CVUR.DEPT_CD AS BRC ,(CVUR.SMS_FLAG, '0') AS SMS_FLAG ,(CVUR.MAIL_FLAG, '0') AS MAIL_FLAG FROM ( SELECT IVAP.GATE_CD , IVAP.BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(IVAP.GATE_CD, IVAP.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , IVAP.AP_NUM , IVAP.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(IVAP.GATE_CD, IVAP.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , POHD.SUBJECT , IVAP.AP_REQ_SUBJECT ,(CASE WHEN IVAP.AP_USER_ID IS NULL THEN IVPC.AP_USER_ID ELSE IVAP.AP_USER_ID END) AS AP_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM , (IVAP.AP_REQ_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS AP_REQ_DATE , POPY.PAY_CNT || '차 : ' || POPY.PAY_CNT_NM AS PAY_INFO , IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT AS PAY_AMT -- 2021.06.30 : 협력사에서 대금지급요청 완료 후 SMS 수수료 부과 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = IVPC.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = IVPC.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT ,(CASE WHEN IVAP.AP_USER_ID IS NULL THEN IVPC.AP_USER_ID ELSE IVAP.AP_USER_ID END) AS USER_ID , 'AP' '@@' IVAP.GATE_CD '@@' IVAP.AP_NUM AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCIVAP IVAP JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVAP.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVAP.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = IVAP.PO_NUM AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVAP.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD = #{PY_BUYER_CD} AND IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD = #{PY_DEPT_CD} AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVAP.AP_NUM = #{AP_NUM} ) A JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (A.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND A.AP_USER_ID = CVUR.USER_ID) WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCIVAP ( GATE_CD , AP_NUM , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , INV_NUM , PO_NUM , VENDOR_CD , BUYER_CD , DEPT_CD , PAY_CNT , PY_BUYER_CD , PY_DEPT_CD , AP_REQ_SUBJECT , AP_REQ_DATE , BILL_DATE , CUR , AP_REQ_AMT , PAY_TERMS , VAT_TYPE , BILL_ATT_FILE_NUM , VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM , VENDOR_RMK , SIGN_STATUS , GUAR_TYPE , GUAR_PERCENT , GUAR_QT , VAT_FLAG , GUAR_AMT , GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM , INSU_STATUS , GUAR_RMK , VENDOR_USER_NM , VENDOR_TEL_NUM , VENDOR_CELL_NUM , PAY_BANK , PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM , PAY_ACC_NM , PAY_ATT_FILE_NUM , GUAR_TYPE2 , GUARANTEER , BOND_BEGN_DATE , BOND_FNSH_DATE ) SELECT IVGH.GATE_CD , #{AP_NUM} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , '0' , IVGH.INV_NUM , IVGH.PO_NUM , IVGH.VENDOR_CD , IVGH.BUYER_CD , IVHD.DEPT_CD , IVGH.PAY_CNT , IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD , IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD , #{AP_REQ_SUBJECT} , CASE WHEN #{TYPE} = 'SEND' THEN SYSDATE ELSE NULL END , #{BILL_DATE} , IVHD.CUR , #{PAY_AMT} , POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE , IVHD.VAT_TYPE , #{BILL_ATT_FILE_NUM} , #{ATT_FILE_NUM} , #{RMK_TEXT_NUM} , #{SIGN_STATUS} , #{GUAR_TYPE} , #{GUAR_PERCENT} , #{GUAR_QT} , '1' , #{GUAR_AMT} , #{GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM} , #{INSU_STATUS} , #{GUAR_RMK} , #{VENDOR_USER_NM} , #{VENDOR_TEL_NUM} , #{VENDOR_CELL_NUM} , #{PAY_BANK} , #{PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM} , #{PAY_ACC_NM} , #{PAY_ATT_FILE_NUM} , #{GUAR_TYPE2} , #{GUARANTEER} , #{BOND_BEGN_DATE} , #{BOND_FNSH_DATE} FROM STOCIVGH IVGH LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEPT_CD = IVHD.DEPT_CD AND POPY.VENDOR_CD = IVHD.VENDOR_CD AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD = #{PY_BUYER_CD} AND IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD = #{PY_DEPT_CD} AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVGH.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM}
mapper.select:
SELECT IVHD.BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , IVHD.DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD , CASE WHEN IVHD.GUAR_TYPE2 = '20' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS GUAR_YN , IVGH.INV_NUM , IVGH.SEND_DATE , IVGH.SUBJECT , POHD.SUBJECT AS PO_SUBJECT , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , IVGH.PO_NUM , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , IVHD.INV_DATE , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , IVGH.PAY_CNT , POHD.CUR , IVHD.INV_AMT , IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT AS PAY_AMT , IVHD.PIC_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS PIC_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS PIC_USER_TYPE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE , IVPC.PAY_TERMS , IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_NM , IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM , POHD.PO_AMT , POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE , POHD.PAY_TYPE , IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT AS PY_AMT , IVAP.SIGN_STATUS , IVAP.AP_NUM , IVAP.AP_REQ_SUBJECT , IVAP.AP_REQ_DATE , IVAP.PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM AS PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM , IVAP.AP_ACCOUT AS AP_ACCOUT , IVAP.AP_DATE , IVAP.AP_AMT , IVAP.AP_REJECT_RMK FROM STOCIVGH IVGH LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM) LEFT JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEPT_CD = POHD.DEPT_CD AND POPY.VENDOR_CD = POHD.VENDOR_CD AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVAP IVAP ON (IVAP.GATE_CD = IVPC.GATE_CD AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = IVPC.BUYER_CD AND IVAP.INV_NUM = IVPC.INV_NUM AND IVAP.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVAP.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND IVAP.DEPT_CD = IVHD.DEPT_CD AND IVAP.PAY_CNT = IVPC.PAY_CNT AND IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD = IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVAP.PY_DEPT_CD = IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND IVAP.SIGN_STATUS IS NOT NULL
AND IVAP.AP_REQ_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVAP.AP_REQ_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND IVAP.AP_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVAP.AP_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND IVHD.INV_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVHD.INV_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(IVAP.AP_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{AP_NUM}) '%'
AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = #{DELIVERY_TYPE}
AND UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(IVHD.INV_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INV_NUM}) '%'
AND IVAP.SIGN_STATUS = #{SIGN_STATUS}
ORDER BY IVAP.SIGN_STATUS , IVHD.INV_NUM DESC

SELECT VNAP.VENDOR_CD , VNAP.PAY_ACC_NM , VNAP.PAY_BANK , GETCODENAME(VNAP.GATE_CD, 'M017', VNAP.PAY_BANK, #{ses.langCd}) AS PAY_BANK_NM , VNAP.PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM AS PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM , VNAP.PAY_ACCOUNT_USER_NM AS PAY_ACCOUNT_USER_NM , VNAP.PAY_ACC_MNG_NM AS PAY_ACC_MNG_NM , VNAP.ATT_FILE_NUM AS PAY_ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(VNAP.GATE_CD, VNAP.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(VNAP.GATE_CD, VNAP.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS PAY_ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT FROM STOCVNAP VNAP WHERE VNAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNAP.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND VNAP.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY VNAP.SEQ
